description: Fusion of multi-broadcast L2 data into physical ionospheric parameters and UTC validation

quality_flags.GOOD: Multi-broadcast fusion with high confidence TEC estimate
quality_flags.MARGINAL: Fusion with moderate confidence or limited broadcasts
quality_flags.BAD: Fusion failed or very low confidence

fields.name: minute_boundary_utc
fields.description: Unix epoch timestamp of minute boundary

fields.name: stations_used
fields.description: Comma-separated list of stations contributing to this solution

fields.name: utc_offset_ms
fields.description: Global clock offset estimate relative to UTC(NIST) after ionospheric correction

fields.name: utc_uncertainty_ms
fields.description: Uncertainty of the global clock offset

fields.name: utc_consistency_flag
fields.description: True if the internal 'steel ruler' model is consistent with UTC(NIST) within uncertainty

fields.name: geometric_solution
fields.description: Geometric triangulation solution (if multiple stations available)
